rule_metadata.name: revbshell
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'revbshell' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule revbshell
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'revbshell' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "revbshell"
		rule_category = "signature_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "ATK/ReVBShel-A" nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /VBS\.Revbshell/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
